name: The Outskirts
description: Collapsed suburbs and rusted car graveyards. The weakest prey — and the hungriest predators — compete for what's left.
ambience: Dust devils spiral through the broken streets. Somewhere a dog barks. Then stops.

name: The Rust Belt
description: Old industrial sprawl. Rusted factories hide raider camps and mutant nests. The air tastes like metal.
ambience: Pipes groan under their own weight. Something moves in the shadows of the refinery.

name: The Dead City
description: A once-great city now choked with rubble and radiation. Powerful enemies have carved out territory in the ruins.
ambience: Wind howls through the canyons of broken skyscrapers. The silence between gusts is worse.

name: The Crater Zone
description: Ground zero of the worst warhead. Highly irradiated. The most dangerous creatures in the wastes call this home.
ambience: The sky here has a permanent green tinge. Your geiger counter doesn't stop clicking.

name: Krag's Fortress
description: The warlord's stronghold, built inside the husk of a pre-war military base. This is where it ends.
ambience: Gun emplacements line every wall. Spotlights sweep the killing ground. One way in. One way out.
